company.name: Kurzgesagt
company.notes: Educational science animation. Cool brand, EU-friendly. Your visual + science combo.

research.status_summary: Actively operating and hiring — Kurzgesagt (77 employees as of April 2026) is posting open roles including a Scriptwriter/Storyteller and Head of YouTube & Production, with no layoff or acquisition signals.
research.hiring_policy: Kurzgesagt offers roles based in Munich/Berlin as well as remote worldwide, explicitly welcoming international talent; no explicit visa sponsorship policy is published, but their EU/Germany base makes them inherently EOR-friendly for EU candidates.
recent_news: Star Birds (collab with Toukana Interactive) launched in Early Access on Steam in September 2025, earned 'overwhelmingly positive' reviews (~95%), and received its first major 'Flora & Fauna' content update in January 2026; full release is planned for Autumn 2026.
A new Star Birds major content update ('Cinnakeet') dropped around late May 2026 with an active community screenshot event (May 26–31, 2026), signaling continued product momentum.

As of May 2026, Kurzgesagt crossed 25 million YouTube subscribers and is described as still 'setting a benchmark' for explainer content in 2026, with new videos on AI, climate, and the future of humanity generating viral cross-platform traction.
research.growth_signal: With 77 employees (up from a historically small team), a diversified revenue model (merch, Patreon, AdSense = 65% of income), an actively developing video game, and 25M+ YouTube subscribers, Kurzgesagt is on a steady multi-product expansion trajectory.
research.fit_for_lior: Kurzgesagt is a strong fit for Lior's Creative AI + visual science storytelling thread — they are actively expanding into interactive/game products and need people who can bridge data-driven science communication with aesthetic, AI-augmented content production; a Scriptwriter, Content Strategist, or Creative AI Product role would be natural entry points.
